steps.title: Introduce the innovation list
steps.content: The clause "made several innovations to the steel drum" is followed by a list of those innovations: wheels, a cover, and amplification. The punctuation must introduce that explanatory list.

steps.title: Reject list-boundary errors
steps.content: Choice A makes "drum" look like part of the list. Choice C gives no clear boundary before the list. Choice D uses a semicolon, but the list is not an independent clause. A colon correctly introduces the list. The answer is B.
